$comment: Stripe product/price seed for paid plans + one-time Event Pass. Idempotent source of truth: `npm run stripe:sync` ensures each product + price exists in the Stripe account of STRIPE_SECRET_KEY (matched by price lookup_key), keeps multi-currency price points (currency_options) in sync on every run, and writes the resulting price ids into the `plans` table (stripe_price_id_monthly/annual, stripe_price_id_onetime for passes). Re-run after any DB wipe, and against each environment (test/prod) by pointing STRIPE_SECRET_KEY + DATABASE_URL at it. Non-USD amounts are SET price points (v3/07 §4), never FX conversions. Community is free (no Stripe).

product.name: Seazn Club Pro
product.description: Unlimited competitions, multi-division, online registration + entry fees, realtime scoreboard, custom branding, CSV/PDF exports.

product.name: Seazn Club Pro Plus
product.description: Everything in Pro, plus unlimited seats and scale, a 1% platform fee on entry fees, AI-assisted scheduling, auto officials assignment, write API access and priority support.

product.name: Seazn Club Event Pass
product.description: One-time upgrade for a single competition: 10 divisions, 32 entrants per division, advanced formats, entry fees, branding, exports and realtime — for the event's lifetime.
